Class SymbolicLayoutReader

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader
public class SymbolicLayoutReader extends Object
Allows to read XML files which contains an object model written via an SymbolicLayoutWriter.
See Also:
  • SymbolicLayoutWriter

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer
    An implementation of ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    static class 
    SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
    An implementation of ISymbolicElement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    An implementation of ISymbolicValue which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

  • Method Details

    • read

      public ISymbolicLayout read(File file) throws ParserConfigurationException, SAXException, IOException
      Reads the given File.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to read.
      Returns:
      The root of the model.
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException - Occurred Exception.
      SAXException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • read

      public ISymbolicLayout read(InputStream in) throws ParserConfigurationException, SAXException, IOException
      Reads from the given InputStream and closes it.
      Parameters:
      in - The InputStream to read from.
      Returns:
      The root of the model.
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException - Occurred Exception.
      SAXException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • isModel

      protected boolean isModel(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an ISymbolicLayout.
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents an ISymbolicLayout, false is something else.

    • isAssociation

      protected boolean isAssociation(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an ISymbolicAssociation.
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents an ISymbolicAssociation, false is something else.
